things.name: Musee du Verre (Glass Museum)
things.description: World-renowned glass museum with an exceptional collection of ancient and modern glasswork

things.name: Bois du Cazier
things.description: UNESCO site of the 1956 mining disaster, now a powerful industrial heritage museum

things.name: Palais des Beaux-Arts
things.description: Art museum with Belgian paintings and sculptures from the 17th to 20th centuries

things.name: Beffroi de Charleroi
things.description: Historic belfry and symbol of the city with panoramic views

things.name: Musee de la Photographie
things.description: Europe's largest photography museum in a renovated Carmelite convent

things.name: Marcinelle Memorial
things.description: Memorial to the victims of the 1956 Bois du Cazier mining catastrophe

things.name: Parc Reine Astrid
things.description: City park popular for walking, sport and relaxation

things.name: La Louviere Ceramics Museum
things.description: Nearby museum of the long-established Hainaut ceramics tradition

things.name: Abbaye de Villers
things.description: Dramatic ruins of a 12th-century Cistercian abbey in a wooded valley nearby

things.name: Thuin Historic Centre
things.description: Charming hilltop town with hanging gardens and medieval towers nearby
